revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:元始祭]]
{{User:Immanuelle/Ritual ceremonies of the Imperial Palace updated}}
'''Genshisai''' (元始祭) is one of the {{ill|Ritual ceremonies of the Imperial Palace|en|Ritual ceremonies of the Imperial Palace|qid=Q11453226|lt=Imperial Court rituals|1=Ritual ceremonies of the Imperial Palace}}. It is classified as a {{ill|Grand Festival|ja|大祭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Grand Festival|qq=}}.
Currently, it is a ritual held on {{ill|January 3|en|January 3|qid=Q2156|lt=January 3|1=January 3}}, where the {{ill|Emperor of Japan|en|Emperor of Japan|qid=Q208233|lt=Emperor|1=Emperor of Japan}} personally officiates as the principal celebrant ("親祭") at the {{ill|Three Palace Sanctuaries|en|Three Palace Sanctuaries|qid=Q7797685|lt=Three Palace Sanctuaries|1=Three Palace Sanctuaries}} (Kashiko-dokoro, Kōreiden, and Shinden). This ceremony celebrates the "origin of the imperial throne" and venerates the {{ill|Ancestors of the Emperor|ja|皇霊|Ancestors of the Emperor=Ancestors of the Emperor|lt=Imperial Ancestral Spirits|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ancestors of the Emperor|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the {{ill|Kami|lt=Kami|lt=Amatsukami and Kunitsukami|ja|天神地祇|Amatsukami and Kunitsukami=Kami|lt=Amatsukami and Kunitsukami|lt=Heavenly and Earthly Deities|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Amatsukami and Kunitsukami|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天津神・国津神|comment=confirming this goes to Kunitsukami|1=Kunitsukami|2=zh|3=國神|4=fr|5=Kunitsukami|6=mni|7=ꯀꯨꯅꯤꯠꯁꯨꯀꯃꯤ}}. The "origin of the imperial throne" refers to the {{ill|Divine Edict of Eternal Reign|ja|天壌無窮の神勅|1=Commandment|2=ja|3=神勅|lt=Commandment of Eternal Reign|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Divine Edict of Eternal Reign|13=User:Immanuelle/Commandment|qq=}}.<ref>大岡弘「『元始祭』並びに『紀元節祭』創始の思想的源流と二祭処遇の変遷について」『明治聖徳記念学会紀要』、復刊第46号、2009th year 、p104</ref>
The Genshisai began on {{ill|January 3, 1870 (Meiji 3)|ja|1870th year 1月3日 (旧暦)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/January 3, 1870 (Meiji 3)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, when the {{ill|Department of Divinities|en|Department of Divinities|qid=Q2264720|lt=Department of Divinities|1=Department of Divinities}} enshrined the {{ill|Eight Deities|ja|八神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Deities|1=Eight Deities|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11391703}} of the {{ill|Eight Divine Halls|ja|八神殿|1=Hasshinden|1=Hasshinden|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Divine Halls|13=User:Immanuelle/Hasshinden|qq=}}, as well as the {{ill|Kami|lt=Kami|lt=Amatsukami and Kunitsukami|ja|天神地祇|Amatsukami and Kunitsukami=Kami|lt=Amatsukami and Kunitsukami|lt=Heavenly and Earthly Deities|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Amatsukami and Kunitsukami|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天津神・国津神|comment=confirming this goes to Kunitsukami|1=Kunitsukami|2=zh|3=國神|4=fr|5=Kunitsukami|6=mni|7=ꯀꯨꯅꯤꯠꯁꯨꯀꯃꯤ}} and the spirits of past emperors.<ref>「年中行事事典」p293 1958th year （昭和33rd year ）5月23日初版発行 西角井正慶編 東京堂出版</ref> The current format of the ritual, held at the Three Palace Sanctuaries, has been observed since {{ill|January 3, 1873 (Meiji 6)|ja|1873rd year 1月3日|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/January 3, 1873 (Meiji 6)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. It was designated as a grand festival under the {{ill|Imperial Household Rites Act|ja|皇室祭祀令|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imperial Household Rites Ordinance|qq=}} on {{ill|September 19, 1908 (Meiji 41)|ja|1908th year 9月19日|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September 19, 1908 (Meiji 41)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. It is the first grand festival held each year. Although the ordinance was abolished on {{ill|May 2, 1947 (Shōwa 22)|ja|1947th year 5月2日|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May 2, 1947 (Shōwa 22)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, the Genshisai continues to be performed in the Imperial Court following traditional practices.
From {{ill|1874|en|1874|qid=Q7761|lt=Meiji 7|1=1874}} to {{ill|1948|en|1948|qid=Q5165|lt=Showa 23|1=1948}}, the Genshisai was also observed as a national {{ill|Holiday|ja|祝祭日|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Holiday|1=Public holidays|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11588597}} under the {{ill|Establishment of Holidays for Annual Festivals and Holidays|lt=Establishment of Holidays for Annual Festivals and Holidays|lt=Law Defining Annual Holidays|ja|年中祭日祝日ノ休暇日ヲ定ム|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Law Defining Annual Holidays|qq=}} and the {{ill|Regarding Holidays|lt=Regarding Holidays|lt=Ordinance Concerning Public Holidays|ja|休日ニ関スル件|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ordinance Concerning Public Holidays|qq=}}.
== References == <references />
== Related Articles == * {{ill|Imperial Household Rites Act|ja|皇室祭祀令|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imperial Household Rites Ordinance|qq=}}
